stat.title: Walk-off Winners
stat.subtitle: Games won on a walk-off play.

notableEvents.label: Carter Jensen walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jase Bowen. Michael Massey scores. Nick Loftin scores.

notableEvents.label: Garrett Mitchell walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Garrett Mitchell singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Jackson Chourio scores. William Contreras to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo singles on a ground ball to center fielder Cam Smith, deflected by pitcher Josh Hader. Wyatt Langford scores. Josh Jung to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Alan Roden walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Alan Roden singles on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Kahlil Watson. Royce Lewis scores. Alex Jackson to 3rd. Luke Keaschall to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jakob Marsee walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee singles on a fly ball to right fielder Miles Mastrobuoni. Xavier Edwards scores. Esteury Ruiz to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dalton Rushing walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Dalton Rushing singles on a ground ball to center fielder Cole Carrigg. Teoscar Hernández scores. Max Muncy to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Yordan Alvarez walk-off home run
notableEvents.detail: Yordan Alvarez homers (29) on a fly ball to center field. Jose Altuve scores.

notableEvents.label: Kahlil Watson walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Kahlil Watson singles on a ground ball to center fielder Junior Perez. Steven Kwan scores. Travis Bazzana to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio walk-off home run
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio homers (6) on a fly ball to right field. Daniel Schneemann scores.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki singles on a fly ball to left fielder Jase Bowen. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores. Alex Bregman to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jarren Duran walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Jarren Duran singles on a line drive to center fielder Max Schuemann. Masataka Yoshida scores.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Gonzalez walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Gonzalez singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Kameron Misner. Colson Montgomery scores. Chase Meidroth to 3rd. Braden Montgomery to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Royce Lewis walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Royce Lewis singles on a ground ball to center fielder Cole Carrigg. Kyler Fedko scores. Victor Caratini to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Logan O'Hoppe walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Logan O'Hoppe singles on a soft ground ball to catcher Samuel Basallo. Nolan Schanuel scores.

notableEvents.label: Victor Bericoto walk-off home run
notableEvents.detail: Victor Bericoto homers (2) on a fly ball to center field.

notableEvents.label: Manny Machado walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado singles on a ground ball to center fielder Michael Harris II. Jackson Merrill scores.

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Guardians challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Sam Antonacci singles on a line drive to center fielder Daniel Schneemann. Braden Montgomery scores. Tristan Peters scores.

notableEvents.label: Jake McCarthy walk-off triple
notableEvents.detail: Jake McCarthy triples (4) on a ground ball to left fielder Jarren Duran. TJ Rumfield scores. Hunter Goodman scores. Cole Carrigg scores.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling singles on a fly ball to right fielder Braden Montgomery. Riley Greene scores. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd. Colt Keith to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ozzie Albies walk-off home run
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies homers (12) on a fly ball to right field. Matt Olson scores.

notableEvents.label: Dalton Rushing walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Dalton Rushing singles on a line drive to right fielder Tyler O'Neill. Alex Call scores. Ryan Ward scores. Throwing error by right fielder Tyler O'Neill.

notableEvents.label: Nick Kurtz walk-off walk
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz walks. Lawrence Butler scores. Henry Bolte to 3rd. Zack Gelof to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw walk-off walk
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw walks. Ian Happ scores. Nico Hoerner to 3rd. Pedro Ramírez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Sterlin Thompson walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Sterlin Thompson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Seiya Suzuki. Troy Johnston scores. Brett Sullivan to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jose Siri walk-off single
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Joey Loperfido. Nick Madrigal scores. Donovan Walton to 3rd.
